commit.message:
fix: Telegram "no response generated" — synthesis, person fields, calendar range (#44)

Three root causes for empty/wrong Telegram responses:

1. When the LLM exhausted all 5 tool rounds, the synthesis round ran
   without tools AND without any instruction to produce text. The LLM
   saw a conversation ending in tool results and produced nothing.
   Fix: add explicit synthesis instruction + fallback from tool results.

2. person_info omitted birthday, company, and position fields — data
   from Apple Contacts was fetched but never shown to the LLM.

3. Calendar search hardcoded ±30 days, missing recurring events like
   birthdays months away. Widened default to ±180 days.

Also: gitignore live e2e test file (contains real names for integration
tests against live server).

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix npm global install permission error

system /boot/system/lib/node_modules which requires root privileges.

commit.message:
Fix npm detection: use exit code instead of output string

The previous logic checked if "npm" appeared in output, but error messages
like "which: npm: Command not found" also contain "npm", causing false
positives. Now uses the exit code from `which` directly.

Fix installer to check npm prerequisite first

for Claude Code. This ensures we install dependencies in the correct order.

New flow: check npm → install npm if needed → check claude → install claude if needed

Fix settings pages not scrollable when content overflows (#89)

The SettingsWorkspace root div used `flex-1` which requires a flex
parent to constrain height, but the parent in AppLayout is not a flex
container. Changed to `h-full` so the height is properly constrained,
allowing `overflow-y-auto` on the content area to activate scrolling.

commit.message:
fix: animations, CS-style body rotation, backward walk, and IDB cache key bug

- AnimationClipCache: strip VRM| prefix from clip names when reading from IDB
  cache — keys were VRM|WalkLoop@32 but STATES expected WalkLoop, causing 0
  actions registered and T-pose
- animation.js: apply _moveDir timeScale to loco actions (backward = -1 reverses
  animation playback); add _bodyYaw tracking and setLookDirection now accepts
  bodyYaw+velocity to compute movement direction relative to body facing
- app.js: CS-style body rotation — clamp body yaw within ±60° of lookYaw,
  snap fast to lookYaw when idle (speed 8) slow when moving (speed 2); pass
  lookYaw-bodyYaw diff to setLookDirection for spine twist

commit.message:
fix top-K alternatives: cache pipeline results for Block 3 endpoints

cache_pipeline_result() was defined but never called, leaving the
in-memory job cache empty. Every top-K request returned 404, causing
the frontend to show "No alternatives available." Now called after
run_full() completes. Also fixed tradeoff_summary field name mismatch
in the frontend.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Claude/fix paid orders sync 8d rz c (#23)

* Fix fulfilled orders being stored as pending on initial insert

Both sync-paid-orders.php and the orders webhook were inserting new
orders without a status column, causing them to default to 'pending'
even when Shopify reports fulfillment_status=fulfilled.  Now both
derive an initial status ('fulfilled' or 'pending') from the Shopify
payload on insert; the ON CONFLICT path in the webhook still omits
status so re-deliveries never overwrite a manually-set status.

Also fixes --all-time in sync-paid-orders.php: Shopify's REST API
silently caps results to ~60 days without a created_at_min, so we now
supply 2000-01-01 as the anchor to retrieve the full order history
from store birth.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01N7KV3opaTphUPXJaSLSfYj

* Change scatter plot x-axis from variant bottle size to total ml sold

Previously x = variant_ml (e.g. 100, 200, 500), which caused all
variants of the same bottle size to stack on the same x position.

Now x = total_units * variant_ml (total ml sold in the period), so
each product/variant plots at its actual sales volume.  This makes
it easy to read volume vs. pricing efficiency at a glance.

Changes:
- ml-revenue.php: compute and return total_ml in each point
- charts.php: use p.total_ml for x, update axis label/ticks,
  update tooltip (adds "Total ml sold" row, keeps "Bottle size"),
  fix color mapping to key off p.ml instead of p.x

https://claude.ai/code/session_01N7KV3opaTphUPXJaSLSfYj

* Aggregate scatter plot by product instead of per variant

Previously each variant was its own dot (grouped by product+variant+ml).
Now all variants of a product are summed into a single point:

  x = SUM(quantity * variant_ml)  — total ml sold across all variants
  y = total_revenue / total_ml    — blended revenue per ml

SQL groups by shopify_product_id only; variant/ml columns removed from
the response since they no longer apply to a product-level aggregate.
Front-end updated: simplified chartData mapping, product-name tooltip
title (no variant suffix), one color per product.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01N7KV3opaTphUPXJaSLSfYj

* Replace per-ml period buttons with dropdown, add volume range filter

- Swap period button row for a compact <select> dropdown (YTD, TTM,
  per-year, and new All Time option)
- Add min/max volume sold (ml) inputs that debounce-reload the chart
- Chart now auto-loads on first accordion open using the default period
- API: accept vol_min/vol_max HAVING filters and 'all' period (no date
  restriction)

https://claude.ai/code/session_01N7KV3opaTphUPXJaSLSfYj

---------

commit.message:
fix: use PowerShell to kill proxy on Windows (bash kill doesn't work)

On Windows, `kill` from Git Bash doesn't actually terminate Python
processes, leaving zombie proxies that still handle requests with
stale config. Use PowerShell Stop-Process for reliable process
management on Windows.

commit.message:
feat: conditional synthesis — discover branching behavior from examples

The solver now tries conditional splits when direct formulas fail:
partitions input/output pairs by conditions (x%2==0, x>0, x<0, x>=0),
fits each branch independently with linear/division formulas.

Result: Collatz step function synthesized from 12 examples!
  x % 2 == 0? -> x / 2, else? -> 3 * x + 1

Limits: 12/14 synthesized (86%), up from 71%.
Only gcd (recursive + modulo) and bit_count (string ops) remain unsolvable.

commit.message:
#631 FASE-A: Reduce LLM instructions from 1,192 to 382 lines (-68%)

Remove redundant directives already covered by deterministic guards:
- Vague dates (guard_vague_dates_force_ask)
- Name validation (4 layers in social_consolidated.py)
- Re-ask known data (_guard_strip_reask_known_data)
- Fabricated bank data (_strip_fabricated_bank_data)

Eliminate contradictory directives:
- "No repitas" vs "SIEMPRE menciona deposito"
- "Max 1 pregunta" vs "responde TODAS"

Consolidate per-tenant instructions to essential business rules only.

Add 7 major features with full CRUD routes, services, and Prisma models:
- Dashboard analytics with SQL-based charts (FF_ANALYTICS)
- Polymorphic comments system (FF_COMMENTS)
- Tags/labels for entity organization (FF_TAGS)
- Bulk user operations (status, delete, role assign)
- Multi-step approval workflows with notifications (FF_APPROVALS)
- Data retention policies with automated cleanup (FF_DATA_RETENTION)
- User groups/teams with member management (FF_GROUPS)

All features are feature-flag gated and multi-tenant isolated.
Includes code quality fixes: parallelized flag checks, SQL aggregation,
shared utilities (formatRelativeTime, StatusBadge), and handleServiceError.
